heading: Disclosures in periodic reports
label: 7261 Disclosures in periodic reports
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended .section 401 of Pub. L. 107–204section 401 of Pub. L. 107–204section 78m of this title
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended .section 401 of Pub. L. 107–204section 401 of Pub. L. 107–204section 78m of this title

children.heading: Commission rules on pro forma figures
children.label: b Commission rules on pro forma figures

children.text: does not contain an untrue statement of a material fact or omit to state a material fact necessary in order to make the pro forma financial information, in light of the circumstances under which it is presented, not misleading; and
reconciles it with the financial condition and results of operations of the issuer under generally accepted accounting principles.

children.heading: Study and report on special purpose entities
children.label: c Study and report on special purpose entities
A
children.text: the extent of off-balance sheet transactions, including assets, liabilities, leases, losses, and the use of special purpose entities; and

children.label: B
children.text: whether generally accepted accounting rules result in financial statements of issuers reflecting the economics of such off-balance sheet transactions to investors in a transparent fashion.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount or an estimate of the amount of off-balance sheet transactions, including assets, liabilities, leases, and losses of, and the use of special purpose entities by, issuers filing periodic reports pursuant to section 78m or 78 of this title;o

children.label: B
children.text: the extent to which special purpose entities are used to facilitate off-balance sheet transactions;

children.label: C
children.text: whether generally accepted accounting principles or the rules of the Commission result in financial statements of issuers reflecting the economics of such transactions to investors in a transparent fashion;

children.label: D
children.text: whether generally accepted accounting principles specifically result in the consolidation of special purpose entities sponsored by an issuer in cases in which the issuer has the majority of the risks and rewards of the special purpose entity; and

children.label: E
children.text: any recommendations of the Commission for improving the transparency and quality of reporting off-balance sheet transactions in the financial statements and disclosures required to be filed by an issuer with the Commission.
